userStories.title: Validate the Codex and ACP fix set using a fresh-context worker iteration
acceptanceCriteria: Inspect the current repository state from disk instead of relying on prior context
Confirm cli/src/agent/ClineAgent.ts exposes openai-codex in ACP model enumeration
Confirm cli/src/agent/messageTranslator.ts emits an immediate agent_thought_chunk for api_req_started
Confirm src/shared/storage/provider-keys.ts includes a default model mapping for openai-codex
Update scripts/ralph/progress.txt with verification notes, learnings, and any blocker
Set passes=true only if the current repo state already achieves the intended functionality without additional required code changes
userStories.notes: Use lightweight local commands and file inspection. Do not create commits.
